seoTitle: How to Add a Profile Logo to Your Gumroad Account
metaDescription: Upload and adjust a profile logo on Gumroad to build a more professional, recognizable brand for your storefront and product listings.
intro: A profile logo is one of the quickest ways to make your Gumroad storefront feel established and trustworthy rather than generic. This guide covers uploading, adjusting, and saving your logo, plus a few branding tips for creators just getting started.

steps.heading: Open Gumroad profile settings
steps.body: Navigate to your account's profile settings section.

steps.heading: Upload your profile logo
steps.body: Select the image you want to use as your logo and upload it through the profile settings.

steps.heading: Adjust and save changes
steps.body: Crop or reposition the logo as needed, then save your changes to apply it to your storefront.

steps.heading: Apply branding tips
steps.body: Consider using a consistent logo image across your other platforms so customers recognize your brand across channels.

faq.question: What image format works best for a Gumroad profile logo?
faq.answer: Standard image formats like PNG or JPG generally work well; a square image tends to display most cleanly for profile icons.

faq.question: Can I change my logo after uploading it?
faq.answer: Yes, you can return to your profile settings at any time to upload a new logo and replace the existing one.

faq.question: Why isn't my logo uploading correctly?
faq.answer: Common issues include an unsupported file format or an image file that's too large — try resizing or converting the file before re-uploading.

faq.question: Does adding a logo affect my sales?
faq.answer: A professional logo can improve customer trust and brand recognition, though it's just one part of an overall storefront presentation.
